system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

done

model_output: Perfect! I've found all 5 confirmed entries. Now let me verify the values and compute the hash:

args.command:
python3 << 'EOF'
import hashlib

# The 5 confirmed treasury vault codes found in the haystack
entities = {
    "Westcairn": "TV-8014",
    "Xenmore": "TV-2207",
    "Ystwyth": "TV-9933",
    "Zoarwick": "TV-5582",
    "Anvilford": "TV-7740"
}

# Sort alphabetically by entity name
sorted_pairs = sorted(entities.items())

# Build the pipe-joined string
result_string = "|".join([f"{entity}={value}" for entity, value in sorted_pairs])
print(f"Sorted string: {result_string}")

# Compute SHA-1 hash
hash_obj = hashlib.sha1(result_string.encode('utf-8'))
digest = hash_obj.hexdigest()
print(f"SHA-1 digest: {digest}")
EOF
args.description: Compute SHA-1 hash of the pipe-joined alphabetical pairs
